title: malva cretica subsp. cretica
intro: Malva cretica subsp. cretica is a subspecies of the Mallow plant, belonging to the Malvaceae family, commonly known for its medicinal and edible properties. The leaves and flowers of this plant have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions, due to their anti-inflammatory and soothing properties. The medicinal properties of Malva cretica subsp. cretica are attributed to its high levels of mucilages, which can help to calm and protect the mucous membranes, promoting relief from coughs, sore throats, and other respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Malva cretica subsp. cretica include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, from wounds and burns to digestive issues and skin irritations.
